waivers.reason: Manual implementation of _populate_default_data() method to create default buffers and channels after authentication. Required for UI to show content after auth completes.
MANUAL_EDIT: Added _save_credentials() and load_saved_credentials() methods for auto-login feature. Also added comprehensive [AUTH-MOUNT] logging for debugging auto-login flow.

SPEC_UPDATE: Added explicit buffer_sidebar.watch_buffers() calls after _populate_default_data() in on_mount(), on_auth_screen_auth_completed(), and on_auth_screen_guest_mode_requested() as per spec/ui-components.md REQUIREMENT: 'When auto-login completes... MUST explicitly call buffer_sidebar.watch_buffers()'. This fixes sidebar not showing buffers after auth.

DEBUGGING: Added comprehensive [AUTH-SCREEN] logging to trace OAuth flow. AuthScreen had no logging, making it impossible to diagnose why credentials weren't being saved. Added logging to: on_connect_button, _start_authentication, _poll_for_completion, on_auth_complete, _request_guest_mode, _on_auth_failed.

UI_FIX: Fixed unlabeled 'Remember Login' checkbox. Added explicit label 'Save credentials for automatic login:' before checkbox, changed checkbox height from '1' to 'auto' to properly display label, styled label with muted color. The checkbox was confusing users because it appeared directly after handle input with no explanation and height:1 clipped the label.

UX_FEATURE: Added Enter key support to submit auth form. Users can now type their handle and press Enter instead of clicking Connect button. Added @on(events.Key) handler for on_key() method that calls _start_authentication() when event.key == 'enter'. Makes auth flow faster and more intuitive.

SPEC_UPDATE: Added channel persistence feature as per spec/auth.md REQUIREMENT: 'The FreeQApp class MUST implement _save_channels() and _load_channels() methods'. Methods save joined channels to ~/.config/freeq/session.json and restore them on app start. Called in on_mount() after auto-login, in on_auth_screen_auth_completed() after OAuth, and in on_unmount() when app closes. Logs [AUTH] for all operations.

BUG_FIX: Changed MessageList height from '100%' to '1fr'. The height: 100% was causing MessageList to take up all available space in the Vertical container, pushing InputBar completely out of view. Using height: 1fr allows MessageList to take remaining space while InputBar gets its natural height. This fixes the 'no way to enter text' issue.
MISSING_IU: This IU file is not needed - code is generated via phoenix-codegen pipeline, not phoenix-regen.

BUG_FIX: Fixed Message class name collision. Textual's Message event class and our chat Message model were both imported as 'Message', causing name collision. Changed Textual's Message import to 'TextualMessage' alias. This was causing runtime errors when Textual tried to dispatch events.

BUG_FIX: Renamed _render_content() to _format_message_content() to avoid conflict with Textual's internal _render_content() method. This was causing 'TypeError: MessageWidget._render_content() missing 1 required positional argument' because Textual's widget rendering called our method incorrectly. Also changed Label with style= to Static with rich.Text for avatar (Label doesn't accept style= parameter).

PERF_FIX: Changed refresh_messages() to use incremental updates instead of remove_children() + remount. Was blocking UI for 16+ seconds with 20+ messages. Now only adds new widgets and preserves existing ones. Also added batch widget creation, timing logs, and debug borders (red for MessageList, blue for messages-container) for visual debugging.

BUG_FIX: Prevented double ## in channel names. Sidebar was adding # prefix to all CHANNEL type buffers, but if buffer.name already started with #, you got ##test. Now checks if buffer.name.startswith('#') and only adds # indicator if needed.

PERF_FIX: Reduced logging overhead by changing POLL event logging from INFO to DEBUG level. Was causing I/O blocking. Now only logs important IRC events at INFO (message, privmsg, notice, join, part). Also added _poll_timer field and cancel it in on_unmount() to prevent exit hang from set_interval keeping event loop alive.

REMOVE_CHECKBOX: Removed the 'Remember Login' checkbox entirely and replaced with always-save behavior. Users were confused by the checkbox, so now credentials are always saved after successful auth. This simplifies the UX and matches expected behavior.
